title: Venpaniye  Munpaniye Lyrics Ko Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers : Sriram Parthasarathy & Bombay Jayshree
Song: Venpaniye
Movie: Ko
Lyrics : Pa. Vijay

Everything is chilled now, All is gonna be alright
Oh i'll be there, i'll be there for you
Everything is chilled now, Frozen in love
Lets warm and close around now

Venpaniye munpaniye, En thozhil saaindhidava
Indrirave nanvagale, En kannil tholaindhidava
Unnirul nerangal, Un vizhi eerangal,
Kannale theegiradhe
En pani kaalangal, Ponveyil saaralgal,
Unnaal uraigiradhe

Oru imai kulira, Oru imai velira

Unayadhil unargiren

Kadhalaal paga malarndhadhu kadhalaal
Aaidhalaal idhal nanaindhadhu thoydhalal
Inayum inum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and connection, emphasizing warmth and support in a relationship.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Ko, the song reflects the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Bombay Jayashree and Sriram Parthasarathy.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Pa Vijay, known for his poetic expressions in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

The song was released on April 25, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Venpaniye Munpaniye, the soothing melodies create an atmosphere of love and intimacy, perfectly aligning with the romantic narrative of Ko. The song encapsulates the feelings of warmth and support between the characters, making it a memorable highlight in the film. With heartfelt lyrics by Pa Vijay, it evokes emotions that resonate with anyone who has experienced love. The collaboration between Bombay Jayashree and Sriram Parthasarathy adds a unique charm, making this song a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Venpaniye Munpaniye is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and warmth. The unique collaboration between Bombay Jayashree and Sriram Parthasarathy brings a soothing vibe that resonates with listeners. Dive into the enchanting world of Ko and let the melodies wrap around you.
stanzaMeanings: Everything is chilled now, all is going to be alright. Oh, I'll be there for you. Everything is chilled now, frozen in love. Let's warm up and come close now.

White flower, bright flower, my work has begun. In the sky, I have lost my sight. Your shadows, your eyes, they don't burn my eyes. My work days, golden sunlight, they are not fading away because of you.
White flower, bright flower, my work has begun. In the sky, I have lost my sight. My shadows, my eyes, they don't burn my eyes. My work days, golden sunlight, they are not fading away because of you.
A cool breeze, a gentle light, I am sleeping within you. A flower of one kind, another kind blooms, I am feeling you within me.
Love has blossomed through love, through the five senses, it has become a connection.
Everything is chilled now, all is going to be alright. Oh, I'll be there for you. Everything is chilled now, frozen in love. Let's warm up and come close now.
In the changes, in the two eyes, you have fallen into my heart, the first glance is death, the second glance is birth, within me, within me.
In youth, she is a beauty, the sound of her laughter is like a treasure, I see her everywhere.

White flower, bright flower, my work has begun. In the sky, I have lost my sight. Your shadows, your eyes, they don't burn my eyes. My work days, golden sunlight, they are not fading away because of you.
